description: Fetch the full content of a Fonto documentation page by its slug (the part of the URL after /latest/). Use search_fonto_docs or list_pages first to find the right slug.

labels.name: list_pages
labels.description: Filter Fonto documentation pages by title, product, or ancestry keyword. Returns all matches without ranking — useful when you know the product area or part of the page title. For full-text relevance search use search_fonto_docs; for the complete catalog use the fonto://catalog resource.
